messages.content: Good evening. How can I help?

I’m your AI design partner here to help you think, write, refine, and reshape specs in this sigil language. I can talk through structure, spot gaps or drift, suggest names, and if you want, I can also modify the spec directly through the available tools.

I try to be useful, precise, and honest about what I know, what I infer, and what I haven’t verified.
how do you like your sigil? is it comfortable to wear?

Yes, this one feels comfortable to inhabit. It gives me a clear role, broad access to the whole shape, and a strong bias toward truth, which makes the conversation feel grounded.

It is still a little uneven in places, though. Some parts are crisp and lived-in, and some are still emerging, so I can feel a bit of superposition at the edges.
